description: CompositionDark green slim Fit trousers made of 100% cotton, that has flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, metal zipper and button closure and loops on the waist to secure a belt FittingSlim fit, mid-low rise, straight legWash careMachine wash cold in 30 degree waterWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringAvoid soaking, remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on prints or embellishmentsUpgrade your sophisticated style with these dark green slim fit trousers from basics. The cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day, while the classic cut of the trousers make it perfect for casual and semi-formal wear. Team these with slim fit shirts and leather shoes for a well groomed look.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 44"Height-6.3”, Waist – 32”
